industry: Data Center Infrastructure / AI Server Integration
thesis: IT services company specializing in data center infrastructure and AI server integration. Recent IPO (November 2024) with explosive growth: revenue 5x in 2 years ($54M → $246M). Turned profitable in 2025 with $15.1M net income. Major multi-year contract for AI rack integration driving growth. Strong balance sheet with $85.5M cash. High customer concentration risk with one major AI customer representing majority of revenue. Extreme volatility (beta 2-4x market).

financials.runway: Strong balance sheet, minimal funding risk

drivers: AI infrastructure demand continues exponential growth
Major customer expands contract or renews multi-year
New AI rack integration customers signed
Margi expansion as company scales operations

risks: Customer concentration — loss of major AI customer would crater revenue
Margin compression from business mix shift
IPO lock-up expirations create selling pressure
AI capex cycle downturn impacts demand

base_case.assumptions: Revenue grows 30-40% in 2026; Major customer relationship stable; New customer wins moderate concentration risk; Margins stabilize at mid-teens; Multiple compression to 1-1.5x revenue.

catalysts.event: AI Infrastructure Spending Updates — Demand signal

key_risks: High customer concentration — one major AI customer majority of revenue
Recent IPO (Nov 2024) with limited track record as public company
Margin compression risk from business mix shift
Competition from established integrators (Flex, Jabil, Celestica)
